function.name: check_availability
function.description: Check available appointment slots for a specific date and optionally a specific doctor or service.

date.description: The requested date in YYYY-MM-DD format

doctor.description: Doctor name if the caller has a preference

service_type.description: Type of service requested, e.g. general consultation, long appointment, occupational health, allied health

function.name: book_appointment
function.description: Book an appointment for a patient. Requires patient name, date, time, and service type.

is_long_appointment.description: Whether this is a longer consultation

function.name: cancel_appointment
function.description: Cancel an existing appointment. Must be at least 1 hour prior to the scheduled time.

appointment_date.description: Date of the appointment to cancel in YYYY-MM-DD format

appointment_time.description: Time of the appointment to cancel in HH:MM format

function.name: reschedule_appointment
function.description: Reschedule an existing appointment to a new date and time.

original_date.description: Original appointment date in YYYY-MM-DD format

new_date.description: New requested date in YYYY-MM-DD format

new_time.description: New requested time in HH:MM format

function.name: transfer_call
function.description: Transfer the caller to a human staff member when needed.

destination.description: Who to transfer to: reception_staff, nurse, practice_manager

function.name: log_call_outcome
function.description: Log the outcome of every call before ending. Always call this tool before ending the conversation.

follow_up_required.description: Whether a staff member needs to follow up
